name: Flowhub Cannabis Retail Management API
what_it_does: Flowhub REST API for cannabis dispensary retail management and compliance platform. Enables AI agents to manage product inventory and menus, process sales transactions with compliance checks, integrate with METRC and state seed-to-sale systems, handle online pre-ordering, manage employee access and roles, access sales analytics, and connect dispensary data with accounting and wholesale systems.
use_cases: Managing cannabis product inventory and menu pricing from dispensary operations agents
Processing compliant sales transactions from retail automation agents
Syncing sales data with METRC state tracking from compliance agents
Accessing dispensary sales analytics from retail performance agents
not_for: Non-cannabis retail without seed-to-sale compliance requirements
Cannabis cultivation without retail dispensary point-of-sale
States where cannabis is not legally permitted
best_when: A licensed cannabis dispensary or MSO using Flowhub wants AI agents to automate inventory management, transaction processing, METRC compliance, and sales analytics workflows.
avoid_when: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Cannabis retail requires valid state licensing and strict regulatory compliance. Age verification must be enforced for every transaction. METRC reporting errors can result in regulatory action.

auth.notes: Flowhub uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Dispensary-level credentials. Partner program for technology integrations. Scopes control access to inventory, transactions, and compliance data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — cannabis dispensary enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly per-location pricing; enterprise pricing for multi-state operators
pricing.notes: Denver, Colorado company, founded 2015. Cannabis retail POS focus. Strong METRC integration. IPad-native POS design. Used by independent dispensaries and emerging MSOs. Competes with Dutchie and Treez.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Cannabis retail requires valid state dispensary license
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 partner program
Age verification enforcement is mandatory for every transaction — automated sales must confirm ID check
METRC integration is compliance-critical — validate all state reporting before automating
US data residency only — cannabis regulations vary by state
Banking limitations affect payment options — cash/debit-focused operations in many states
agent_readiness.security_notes: Cannabis customer and compliance data. PCI-DSS, SOC2. OAuth2 with scopes. US data residency. State cannabis licensing mandatory. Age verification required.

security_score_components.security_notes: Cannabis customer data with compliance requirements. PCI-DSS, SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency. State licensing and METRC compliance required.
